Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class AbstractFeatureStrategy

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.StaticFeatureCollection
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.AbstractFeatureStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Feature, Strategy, Named
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaCardDLStrategy, PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro.RemovePostStrategy
public abstract class AbstractFeatureStrategy extends StaticFeatureCollection implements Strategy

    • instantiateApp

      public void instantiateApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal, RuleAppCostCollector collector)
      Description copied from interface: Strategy
      Instantiate an incomplete RuleApp. This method is called when the AutomatedRuleApplicationManager comes across a rule application in which some schema variables are not yet instantiated, or which is in some other way incomplete. The strategy then has the opportunity to return/provide a list of (more) complete rule applications by feeding them into the provided RuleAppCostCollector.
      Specified by:
      instantiateApp in interface Strategy

    • instantiateApp

      protected abstract RuleAppCost instantiateApp(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pio, Goal goal, MutableState mState)
